import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for t in toks
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let n = nums.len()
mut found = false
mut fi = 0
mut fj = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n and not found
  mut j = i + 1
  while j < n and not found
    let a = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let b = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if a + b == target
      found = true
      fi = i
      fj = j
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  print("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
else
  print("none")
end
